scope.rationale: PyTorch Dataset + DataLoader + transforms (DiffusionDet 동치: short 800-1333 + flip 0.5). Hydra configs/data/{coco,voc}.yaml — batch_size 등 재현성 자료.

steps.name: transforms-common
steps.success_metric: test -f datasets/transforms.py && python3 -c 'from datasets.transforms import build_transforms; print(build_transforms.__name__)'
steps.summary: datasets/transforms.py — build_transforms(short_sides, max_size, flip_prob, mean, std, is_train) + Compose/RandomResize/RandomHorizontalFlip/ToTensor/Normalize + collate_fn (32-multiple zero-padding). torchvision.transforms.functional 사용, detectron2 의존성 0. AC PASS (640x480 PIL → tensor [3,800,1067], boxes shape [1,4]).

steps.name: coco-dataset-loader
steps.summary: datasets/coco/{dataset.py,sanity_loader.py} — CocoDetection(ann_file, image_dir, transforms) + cat_id(1-90)→cat_idx(0-79) 매핑 + drop_empty(background-only 제외) + build_coco_loader(cfg, split, seed). sanity_loader: OmegaConf 로 configs/data/coco.yaml 로드 + batch_size 오버라이드 + 1-batch 검증. AC PASS: batch_shape=[2,3,800,1248], num_targets_per_image=[19,14], cat_idx_range=[0,72], sanity_pass=true. jq AC 통과 (재재검증 2026-05-22).

steps.name: voc-dataset-loader
steps.summary: datasets/voc/{dataset.py,sanity_loader.py} — VOCDetection(devkit_root, split, transforms, drop_difficult, drop_empty) + VOC_CLASSES→0-19 인덱싱 + difficult=1 학습 제외 + build_voc_loader(cfg, split='train'|'eval', seed). sanity_loader: OmegaConf 로 configs/data/voc.yaml 로드 + named split(voc07-trainval/voc07-test/voc12-trainval/voc-trainval-combined) → cfg.train_split/eval_split 오버라이드. AC PASS: batch_shape=[2,3,800,1088], num_targets_per_image=[1,1], cat_idx_range=[3,18], split=voc07-trainval, sanity_pass=true. jq AC 통과 (재재재검증 2026-05-22).

steps.name: hydra-configs
steps.success_metric: test -f configs/data/coco.yaml && test -f configs/data/voc.yaml && python3 -c 'from omegaconf import OmegaConf; OmegaConf.load("configs/data/coco.yaml")'
steps.summary: configs/{train,eval}.yaml + configs/data/{coco,voc}.yaml — Hydra defaults 합성 검증 통과. coco.yaml: batch_size=16, num_workers=8, transforms.train.short_sides=[480..800], max_size=1333, flip_prob=0.5; eval.short_sides=[800]. voc.yaml: 동일 transforms + train_split=voc-trainval-combined / eval_split=voc07-test. batch_size 는 configs/data/{coco,voc}.yaml 한 곳에서만 결정 (재현성 자리). AC PASS: OmegaConf.load OK + hydra compose(train, data=coco) → batch_size=16 / model=diffusiondet / loss=diffusion_set_loss, data=voc override → num_classes=20.
